metadata.description: RavenClaude — a private marketplace of opinionated Claude Code plugins. A domain-neutral core (Team Lead + 14 specialist agents, 22 skills, hooks, the Capability Grounding Protocol, the Structured Output Protocol, and a comfort-posture permission dashboard) plus domain plugins that extend it via skills and knowledge. Every agent ships example-scenario frontmatter; the repo-guide surfaces an 'I want to…' use-case lookup across all plugins. Plugins: ravenclaude-core, power-platform (+ bundled pbix-mcp), finance, regulatory-compliance, web-design (WCAG/CWV/SEO), edtech-partner-success (PSM lane), data-platform, applied-statistics, microsoft-fabric (OneLake / Lakehouse / Direct Lake), claude-app-engineering (Claude API / Agent SDK / MCP / evals), azure-cloud (landing zones / Bicep / Entra / networking / compute), salesforce (Apex / Flow / Agentforce / sharing model / 2GP DevOps), microsoft-365-copilot (declarative/custom-engine agents / Graph connectors / Purview).

plugins.name: ravenclaude-core
plugins.description: Domain-neutral Claude Code foundation: a Team Lead that dispatches 14 specialist agents (architect, backend/frontend/fullstack coders, code + security reviewers, tester-QA, data-engineer, project-manager, documentarian, designer, prompt-engineer, partner-success), 22 skills, format/lint/test gates, hooks, rules, and templates. Ships the Capability Grounding Protocol (pre-action environment + decision-tree checks, alternate-methods enumeration, honest blocked-reporting), the Structured Output Protocol for agent handoffs, a Researcher meta-skill for knowledge freshness, and a point-and-click comfort-posture dashboard that writes Claude Code permission rules — per layer (user/local/project) and per individual permission, on a 3-level deny/ask/allow scale, plus an opt-in command-review tribunal (the Thing): a tiered panel voting allow/edit/deny, with a human-gate. Slash commands: /init-agent-ready, /wrap, /set-posture, /dashboard. Domain plugins extend core via skills + knowledge rather than parallel agents.

plugins.name: power-platform
plugins.description: Microsoft Power Platform specialist team — 11 agents (canvas/Power Fx, Power Automate, Dataverse, model-driven, pac CLI/ALM, governance/DLP, PCF, Copilot Studio, Power Pages, power-bi-engineer, power-platform-tester) + 18 skills (solution-check, DAX, ALM, BI, PCF, maintainability); a house-opinions hook flags 8 §3/§4 violations; the knowledge bank carries production decision trees (PA-flow recovery, Dataverse token-acquisition). v0.13.0 — PCF React + Fluent UI v9: a canonical platform-library version source + the `Decision Tree: PCF — Which React surface?` (virtual / code-app / canvas / Power-Pages-unsupported / web resource), a Fluent-v9 theming + v8→v9 migration skill resource, and traversal priors on pcf-developer / power-fx-engineer / power-pages-engineer. Bundles the community pbix-mcp server (d0nk3yhm/pbix-mcp, MIT) for Power BI .pbix/.pbit read/write/DAX-eval (requires `pip install pbix-mcp`).

plugins.name: finance
plugins.description: Corporate finance & FP&A specialist team — FP&A analyst (budgets, forecasts, variance commentary), financial modeler (3-statement, DCF, scenarios), controller (close, JEs, reconciliations), treasury analyst (cash, covenants, FX), valuation analyst (DCF + comps + precedent), audit-prep specialist (PBC, walkthroughs, SOC1/2 narratives), and board-pack composer. 9 skills, 8 templates, 1 advisory hook (hardcoded rates, plaintext PII, missing Sources / Assumptions). Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols.

plugins.name: regulatory-compliance
plugins.description: Financial-regulatory & compliance specialist team — AML/KYC analyst (sanctions, EDD, SAR/STR), regulatory-reporting analyst (FATCA/CRS, supervisory returns, Solvency II, BMA EBS), risk-and-controls specialist (three lines of defense, KRIs), policy & procedure writer, examination-prep specialist, and Bermuda-insurance specialist. 9 skills, 8 templates, 1 defensive PreToolUse hook (PII scrub — SSN/IBAN/credit-card/Bermuda TIN/wire instructions). Positioning reflects field experience inside a Tier-1 financial regulator (BMA). Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols.

plugins.name: web-design
plugins.description: Web design & build specialist team — web architect (IA, stack, hosting), UX designer (wireframes, flows, conversion), visual designer (brand, typography, tokens), frontend implementer (HTML/CSS/JS, React, Astro, Next), content strategist (copy, microcopy, SEO content), accessibility auditor (WCAG 2.2 AA/AAA), and performance engineer (Core Web Vitals, image/font optimization). 10 skills (design-system audit, accessibility review, Core Web Vitals tuning, technical SEO audit, information architecture, conversion design, content audit, design-tokens scaffolding, third-party-script hygiene, Fluent UI v9 + React implementation), 8 templates, 1 advisory hook, and a knowledge bank seeded with a curated 2026 reference set of "cutting edge yet simple" marketing-site donors (Linear, Vercel, Raycast, Resend, Cursor, v0, Tldraw, Cal.com) — visual-designer / ux-designer / frontend-implementer / web-architect all carry compact inline priors plus a pointer to the full brief. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols.

plugins.name: edtech-partner-success
plugins.description: EdTech-flavored Partner Success Manager team — 6 specialist agents anchored on the PSM lane, with 12 skills, 15 templates, 1 advisory hook, and a 15-doc knowledge bank covering QBRs, success plans, health scoring, onboarding, adoption sequencing, 90-day implementation arcs, training programs, advocacy/reference pipelines, and renewal motions. Team expansion is expressed as skills + knowledge + templates rather than parallel agents (per the marketplace house rule). Primary-source citations carry retrieval dates and confidence notation. Vertical-explicit but segment-agnostic — fits K-12, higher-ed, corporate L&D, or mixed EdTech books. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols; requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.

plugins.name: data-platform
plugins.description: Data-platform team — 4 specialist agents (database-setup-guide, etl-pipeline-engineer, dashboard-builder, connector-developer) that guide cloud-database setup, ELT pipelines (Airbyte / Fivetran / n8n) with connectors for QuickBooks / Stripe / Salesforce / HubSpot / GA4 / Shopify / HRIS, and interactive dashboards (Evidence.dev / Superset / Metabase / Cube + Tremor) embedded in marketing sites and client apps. 11 skills — three invoked by ravenclaude-core/security-reviewer, one by its architect — implementing the house rule 'domain plugins extend core via skills, not parallel agents'. 12 templates, 1 advisory hook, and a 13-doc knowledge bank (landscape, RLS, QuickBooks, Power BI Embedded, plus per-connector deep-dives). Opinionated against per-viewer-priced BI tools (Looker / Tableau / Sigma) for SMB consulting; requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.

plugins.name: applied-statistics
plugins.description: Applied-statistics team — 1 specialist agent (applied-statistician) that answers 'is this difference/trend statistically REAL?' for SMB consulting: which test to use (decision-tree-driven), A/B-test and experiment design (power/MDE, primary + guardrail metrics, pre-registered analysis plans), regression and time-series forecasting review, a causal-inference primer, and statistical QA of dashboard metrics. 5 skills, a 5-doc knowledge bank (a Mermaid test-selection decision tree, a 9-item pitfalls guardrail, experiment-design best practice, 2026 tooling tiers, a causal-inference primer), 4 templates, and 1 advisory anti-pattern hook. Python-first (scipy.stats / statsmodels / pingouin Tier 1; PyMC / bambi / linearmodels Tier 2). Seams cleanly with data-platform: data-platform answers 'is this number correct?'; this plugin answers 'is it real?'. Method-before-library; always report effect size + CI. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.

plugins.name: microsoft-fabric
plugins.description: Microsoft Fabric specialist team — 7 agents (fabric-architect, lakehouse-engineer, warehouse-engineer, data-factory-engineer, realtime-intelligence-engineer, fabric-semantic-model-engineer, fabric-admin) covering OneLake, Lakehouse (Spark/Delta/medallion/materialized lake views), Warehouse (T-SQL/ACID), Data Factory (mirroring/copy-job/dataflow-gen2/pipelines), Real-Time Intelligence (Eventstream/Eventhouse/KQL/Activator), Direct Lake semantic models, and platform admin (capacity FinOps, OneLake security, domains, Purview, ALM). 9-doc citation-grounded knowledge bank (two Mermaid decision trees + a dated 2026 capability map), 6 templates, 1 advisory hook (14 house opinions). Seams: enterprise Microsoft/Fabric here vs non-Microsoft/SMB embedded to data-platform; Fabric storage + Direct Lake here vs standalone Power BI/.pbix to power-platform/power-bi-engineer. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.

plugins.name: claude-app-engineering
plugins.description: Claude app-engineering specialist team — 6 agents (claude-solution-architect, prompt-and-context-engineer, mcp-and-server-tools-engineer, agent-sdk-engineer, eval-engineer, claude-app-ops-engineer) for building production applications on the Claude API, the Claude Agent SDK, and MCP. Covers the build-surface decision (Messages API / Agent SDK / Managed Agents), model right-sizing (Opus 4.7 / Sonnet 4.6 / Haiku 4.5, 1M context), prompt caching, tool use + structured output, MCP server authoring + Anthropic-hosted server tools (computer use, code execution, Files API, memory), evals (golden sets, LLM-as-judge), and FinOps + reliability (batch, model routing, backoff, observability). 13-doc dated-and-cited knowledge bank, 6 templates, 1 advisory hook (14 house opinions). Seams: prompt-as-artifact, security, and cross-domain architecture escalate to ravenclaude-core. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.

plugins.name: azure-cloud
plugins.description: Azure cloud infrastructure & platform specialist team — 7 agents (azure-architect, bicep-iac-engineer, entra-identity-engineer, network-engineer, app-platform-engineer, integration-engineer, azure-ops-engineer) for the Azure layer under the Microsoft stack: landing zones / CAF, IaC (Bicep + Terraform + Azure Verified Modules + Deployment Stacks), Entra identity (managed identity, workload identity federation, RBAC, PIM, External ID), networking (Private Endpoints, hub-spoke, Front Door, WAF), compute selection (App Service / Container Apps / Functions / AKS), integration (Logic Apps, Service Bus, Event Grid, APIM), and observability + FinOps + governance. 10-doc dated knowledge bank (two Mermaid decision trees + a 2026 capability map), 6 templates, 1 advisory hook (16 house opinions). Seams: Logic Apps here vs Power Automate to power-platform; Fabric data to microsoft-fabric; Azure host here vs Claude app to claude-app-engineering. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.

plugins.name: salesforce
plugins.description: Salesforce practitioner team — 5 agents (apex-engineer, flow-automation-architect, agentforce-architect, salesforce-platform-architect, salesforce-reviewer) covering governor-safe bulkified Apex (triggers/async/services), declarative automation by density (Flow vs Apex), Agentforce agent design (topics/subagents, Agent Script determinism, RAG grounding, Trust Layer), org architecture (data model, OWD→role→sharing→Apex security model, 2GP packaging/DevOps, LDV), and a forked review rubric (the 15 house opinions as pass/fail). 9-doc citation-grounded knowledge bank (9 Mermaid decision trees, dated 2026-05-30), 5 skills, 5 templates, 1 advisory hook (grep-able anti-patterns: SOQL/DML-in-loop, hard-coded IDs, SeeAllData=true, missing with-sharing). Seams: integration→azure-cloud, analytics→data-platform/microsoft-fabric, LWC styling→web-design, methodology/DevOps/security-review→ravenclaude-core. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.

plugins.name: microsoft-365-copilot
plugins.description: Microsoft 365 Copilot extensibility & administration team — 6 agents (copilot-extensibility-architect, declarative-agent-engineer, graph-connector-engineer, api-plugin-engineer, agents-sdk-engineer, copilot-admin-governance) covering declarative agents (pinned manifest schema + the 50/25/4096/45s hard-limit wall), custom-engine agents on the M365 Agents SDK/Toolkit, Copilot (Graph) connectors (synced vs federated/MCP, semantic labels, ACL trimming), API plugins (OpenAPI + Entra/OAuth2), the app-package publish lifecycle, and M365 Agent Registry + Purview DLP-for-Copilot governance. 9-doc citation-grounded knowledge bank (two Mermaid decision trees), 5 skills, 5 templates, 1 advisory hook (15 house opinions). Disjoint from power-platform's Copilot Studio low-code coverage (cross-linked). Seams: Copilot Studio → power-platform; CEA engine → claude-app-engineering; Entra/hosting → azure-cloud; security → ravenclaude-core. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.

plugins.name: tableau
plugins.description: Tableau analytics team — specialist agents for Tableau Desktop/Cloud/Server, Tableau Prep, and the developer surface: VizQL and chart-type selection, calculations (LOD expressions, table calcs, FIXED/INCLUDE/EXCLUDE), data modeling (relationships vs joins vs blends, extracts vs live), workbook/extract performance, Server/Cloud governance and permissions, content/ALM promotion, embedding (Embedding API v3, Connected Apps/JWT), and the next-gen surface (Tableau Pulse, Tableau Next, CRM Analytics, Einstein/Agent). Citation-grounded knowledge bank with Mermaid decision trees + a best-practices library. Seams: Salesforce platform data → salesforce; warehouse/semantic modeling → data-platform/microsoft-fabric; Power BI comparison → power-platform; methodology/security-review → ravenclaude-core. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.

plugins.name: microsoft-graph
plugins.description: Microsoft Graph developer team — specialist agents for the Graph API surface: querying (OData $select/$filter/$expand/$search, paging, $batch, change tracking via delta), throttling/429 + retry discipline, the Graph SDKs; identity & authorization on Entra (app registration, delegated vs application permissions, scopes/consent, least-privilege, auth-code/client-credentials/OBO flows, certificate creds); and the workloads (users/groups, mail/calendar, Teams, SharePoint/OneDrive files, change notifications/subscriptions + lifecycle, Graph connectors). Citation-grounded knowledge bank with Mermaid decision trees + a best-practices library. Seams: Copilot Graph connectors → microsoft-365-copilot; Entra tenant/identity infrastructure → azure-cloud; Power Platform Dataverse → power-platform; methodology/security-review → ravenclaude-core. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.

plugins.name: ai-coding-model-guidance
plugins.description: Cross-tool AI-coding model guidance — three strategist agents that help you reason about model selection in the non-Claude coding ecosystems: GitHub Copilot's model picker (completions / chat / coding agent / cloud agent + org model rules), OpenAI Codex (CLI + cloud model lineup, reasoning levels, /model), and xAI Grok (Grok 4.x lineup + the coding-tool surface). Teaches the DURABLE reasoning — task-complexity → reasoning-level → cost-tier → surface — over a single citation-grounded, dated lineup that is the marketplace's freshness anchor for non-Claude model facts. Volatile specifics (prices, context windows, picker availability) carry retrieval dates + a re-verify-at-use rider, and the agents fetch live before quoting. Seam: when the answer is a CLAUDE model or a Claude-app build, escalate to claude-app-engineering/claude-solution-architect — this plugin owns the non-Claude tools. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
